<script>
  (() => {
    const header = document.getElementById('js-header')
    const subMenus = [...header.querySelectorAll('.sub-menu')];
    subMenus.forEach((subMenu) => {
      const parent = subMenu.parentElement;
      const wrapper = document.createElement('span');
      wrapper.className = 'js-megamenu-trigger l-header_megamenu__trigger';
      const prevSibling = subMenu.previousElementSibling;
      prevSibling.className = 'u-flex -acenter';
      const parentTitle = prevSibling.textContent;
      wrapper.appendChild(prevSibling);
      const children = [...subMenu.querySelectorAll('a')];
      parent.removeChild(subMenu)
      parent.appendChild(wrapper);
      const megamenu = document.createElement('div');
      megamenu.className = 'l-header_megamenu';
      const megamenuInner = document.createElement('div');
      megamenuInner.className = 'l-header_megamenu__inner c-fluid';
      const megamenuTitle = document.createElement('p');
      megamenuTitle.className = 'c-text01 -thin title';
      megamenuTitle.textContent = parentTitle;
      megamenuInner.appendChild(megamenuTitle);
      megamenu.appendChild(megamenuInner);
      children.forEach((child) => {
        child.className = 'c-button c-button-secondary js-button -md -thin'
        child.innerHTML = `<span>${child.textContent}</span><span class="c-icon"><img class="js-svg" src="/img/common/icon/arrow.svg" alt="" /></span>`;
        megamenuInner.appendChild(child);
      })
      wrapper.appendChild(megamenu);
    })
